name: @myndhyve/wop-conformance
description: Black-box conformance test suite for WOP-compliant servers. FINAL v1.0 (suite at 1.11.0). 1.11.0 adds LT3 partial: idempotencyRetry (RFC 0002 contracts), redactionAdversarial (canary injection through input surfaces), providerPolicyEnforcement (denial-shape contracts), maliciousManifest (registry rejection paths), eventOrdering (polling order correspondence). 1.10.0 added pack-registry read-shape scenarios + private-scoped pack-manifest fixture. 1.9.0 added approval-payload vocabulary scenarios. 1.8.0 vendored api/openapi.yaml + api/asyncapi.yaml + schemas/*.schema.json into the published tarball.
